text.title: Rust Ownership Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes 3-question answers to canonical parameter kind. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the function keep the value after returning (store / return / drop later)?

branch.question: Does another scope also keep the value?
Do the holders live in different threads?

conclusion.verdict: `Rc<T>` (single-threaded ref count). RefCell only if genuine graph cycle.

branch.question: Does the function modify the value?

text.example: keeps_value=false (function reads file, returns parsed struct, drops input path) → modifies=false → `&Path` parameter. Compare to `fn load(path: PathBuf)` antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml str-vs-string-confusion.
